title: Eastern Washington Association of Disability Examiners (EWADE) — Constitution & By-Laws
description: Constitution and by-laws of the Eastern Washington Association of Disability Examiners (EWADE), a NADE chapter in the Pacific Region whose mission is to promote NADE's ideals in the Spokane, Washington DDS office. The constitution covers name, purpose (including a mission and vision statement), membership (Spokane DDS region employees and medical consultants), meetings, officers (President, Vice-President, Secretary, Treasurer), by-laws, and amendments; the by-laws detail the EWADE Board and its powers, officer duties, amendments, and rules of order.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Eastern Washington (EWADE) Chapter
source.title: Eastern Washington Association of Disability Examiners Constitution & By-Laws

notes: Authoritative: this is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source document Washington-East-Const-Bylaws.doc. This is a regional Washington chapter (Spokane/Eastern Washington), distinct from the Renton-Seattle and Olympia (OlyWADE) Washington chapters also in this directory; chapter name taken from the document body. No adoption/revision date is stated, so temporal_coverage is omitted. Related to the NADE regional constitutions/bylaws link index.
